title: Wholesale
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
The '''''Wholesale''''' was a [[needle ship]] and the [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] of the [[Squib Reclamation Fleet]] at some point before the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. The [[Squib/Legends|Squib]] [[Smileredon-Verdont]] claimed to have been born on the ''Wholesale''.

{{Ship-stub}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-12-11 -->''[[Heroes & Rogues]]''
